title: Listing Addressees — 'Distribution:' Line Only
plain_language_rule: When a multiple-address letter has more than 4 addressees, type 'Distribution:' in uppercase followed by a colon on the second line below the last line of the text. Skip one line after 'Distribution:', then list addressees. Address addressees as described in Chapter 7.
source_text: TBD - exact manual text required before activation
renderer_impact: For >4 addressees, 'Distribution:' appears on the second line below the last line of text, with one blank line before the first addressee. Each addressee on a separate line.
notes: The >4 addressee threshold triggers the 'Distribution:' line format. No 'To:' line is used in this format. Placement relative to the text body and blank-line spacing are layout rules.
